title: Jugnu
actors: Dilip Kumar, Noor Jehan, Shashikala Jawalkar
plot: Suraj (Dilip Kumar) and Jugnu (Noor Jehan) study in the same college and fall in love. Jugnu's parents died when she was young, and her father's friend, whom she calls Chachaji, looks after her college and other expenses. Suraj be...
